insight: The strict existence result survives a denominator correction, but the historical 1/15 was conditional on scenario eligibility. Official-harness backfill executed all 37 valid patches and yields N=24 certified, k=1 strict confirmed, and u=6 unadjudicated. The standing report is therefore 1/24 confirmed lower bound, 7/24 worst-case missing-outcome upper bound, and 1/18 complete-case sensitivity. Missing witnesses and incomplete judges remain missing rather than silently becoming negatives.
next_action: Commit and CI-validate the corrected iter200 result, then harden iter202 paid-stage resumability and raw response accounting before retaining any iter202 solver output.
